address: Klong Hae, Hat Yai District, Songkhla

description.en: Evening floating market with local food boat rides and cultural performances
description.nl: Avond drijvende markt met lokaal eten boottochten en culturele optredens

metaTitle.en: Hat Yai Floating Market (Khlong Hae) — Free Entry, Open Fri-Sun
metaTitle.nl: Hat Yai Drijvende Markt (Khlong Hae) — Gratis Entree, Open Vrij-Zon

metaDescription.en: Visit Southern Thailand's only floating market. Khlong Hae Hat Yai: free entry, eco-friendly food in coconut shells, boat rides & cultural shows. Open Fri-Sun 13:00-21:00. Photos, tips & directions.
metaDescription.nl: Bezoek de enige drijvende markt in Zuid-Thailand. Khlong Hae Hat Yai: gratis entree, eten in kokosnootschalen, boottochten & shows. Open vrij-zon 13:00-21:00. Foto's, tips & routebeschrijving.
